fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Arkansas Occupational Therapist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a occupational therapist? Here's whether your license transfers to Arkansas - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: occupational therapist license reciprocity arkansas, how to transfer occupational therapist license to arkansas, occupational therapist compact arkansas, arkansas occupational therapist endorsement application

board.name: Arkansas State Medical Board — OT Section
board.mailing_address: Arkansas State Medical Board, 1401 West Capitol Avenue, Suite 340, Little Rock, Arkansas 72201-2936

license_types.title: Occupational Therapist Registered (OTR)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice occupational therapy independently in Arkansas.

license_types.title: Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant (COTA)
license_types.description: Requires an associate degree and practicing under the supervision of a licensed OTR.

steps.title: Register and Apply Online
steps.description: Create an account on the ASMB Online Application Portal and complete the entire online application, providing all required personal and professional information for licensure by endorsement.

steps.title: Pay Application Fee
steps.description: Submit the non-refundable initial licensure by endorsement application fee through the ASMB Online Application Portal upon completion of your application.

steps.title: Submit Supporting Documentation
steps.description: Arrange for official transcripts from an ACOTE-accredited program, NBCOT scores, and verification of licensure from all states where you have held an OT license to be sent directly to the Arkansas State Medical Board. Upload a current photograph to your application.

steps.title: Complete Criminal Background Check (CBC)
steps.description: Follow the instructions provided by the ASMB to complete the required fingerprint-based criminal background check through an approved vendor for the state of Arkansas.

steps.title: Pass the Arkansas Jurisprudence Exam
steps.description: Complete the open-book online jurisprudence examination, which assesses knowledge of Arkansas laws and regulations pertaining to occupational therapy practice.

steps.title: Monitor Application Status
steps.description: Regularly check your application status via the ASMB Online Application Portal for any requests for additional information or updates on your licensure.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NBCOT exam.

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the NBCOT exam. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Occupational therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current NBCOT certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Arkansas OT license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around  to . Check the specific fee breakdown.

faqs.question: Is NBCOT certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the NBCOT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across all states.

faqs.question: Does Arkansas have reciprocity for occupational therapists?
faqs.answer: Arkansas has enacted the OT Compact, but compact privileges are not yet issuing. For now, occupational therapists still apply by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my occupational therapist license to Arkansas?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Arkansas while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Occupational therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current NBCOT certification.

hero.title: Become a Occupational Therapist in Arkansas
hero.dek: To apply for an Occupational Therapist license in Arkansas, you must create an account and complete the application through the ASMB Online Application Portal.

variants.label: New Applicant
variants.description: How to become licensed/certified for the first time

variants.label: Reciprocity

variants.label: Renewal

official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the ASMB Online Application Portal, click 'New User Registration', provide your Social Security Number and Date of Birth to verify eligibility, and follow the prompts to create your user account.
